productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men New Amanda Brown Casual Shoe
description: This buckaroo men New Amanda Brown Casual shoe is the essence of the brand's signature rugged style. True to its origin from the Mexican plains, this shoe is the essence of the man-about-town nonchalance. It pays tribute to the Texas cowboy lifestyle with its stitch detailing on the upper leather. Pair it with distressed jeans, casual check shirt and a tonal belt to recapture the masculine flamboyance of the Wild West. Upper Full grain leather upper for added durability and style Stitched leather overlay around the foot for better support Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Brand logo embossed on lateral side of the heel Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant TPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs for enhanced grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
